## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed.

Fixes #(issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that breaks existing API)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring / Code cleanup

## How Has This Been Tested?

- [ ] `ruff check src/ tests/` passes
- [ ] `python -m pytest tests/ -q --tb=short` passes
- [ ] Manual testing (describe below)

## Checklist:

- [ ] My code follows the project's existing code style
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally
- [ ] I have updated AGENTS.md if changing module behavior
- [ ] I have updated README.md / README.zh.md if needed

## Additional context
